# Control System Architecture: Why PLC Selection Defines Long-Term Performance in Biosafety Airlock Systems

## 适用受众
CTO

## 写作角度说明
CTO 在评估供应商时，往往关注表面的技术参数（漏风率、压差数值），但真正能区分供应商技术深度的是**控制系统架构**。本角度从"为什么控制算法是技术护城河的核心"切入，帮助 CTO 建立评估供应商技术深度的底层逻辑。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
A supplier's control algorithm architecture—not just its sealing specifications—is the true differentiator in high-specification biosafety airlock systems.

## 参考素材
- ISO 14644-1:2015 Cleanroom classification standards for differential pressure gradient requirements (recommended ≥ 15 Pa gradient)
- Control system architecture comparison dimensions: PLC brand selection (Siemens S7 vs domestic alternatives), response time (≤ 50ms vs ≤ 200ms), fail-safe mode (fail-secure vs fail-open)
- Third-party validation data sources: WHO Laboratory Biosafety Manual, FDA 21 CFR Part 11 electronic signature requirements
- JIEHAO's self-developed Siemens PLC control system as a high-standard case study (non-promotional, objective reference)
- RS232/RS485/TCP/IP communication protocol support for system integration

## 关键词
Control Architecture, PLC Systems, Fail-Safe Mode, ISO 14644-1, Biosafety Airlock, Siemens PLC
